'''Ker-Zakk''' was a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] born in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. He was arrested in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] for fighting in [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]], and tried to attack his [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] rival [[Egome Fass]].

==Appearances==
